content:
I do not know what 'personal backup' program is. I do know that users get hurt when using backups that don't work on restore. Your best best is to do a restore that is supported here. Here is a simple process

BACKUP

  1. ensure thunderbird is not running
  2. enter %appdata% in search window on task bar and press Enter key
  3. this should open windows file explorer in Appdata\roaming folder
  4. highlight the Thunderbird folder and copy to external media

RESTORE

  1. ensure thunderbird is installed and NOT running
  2. enter %appdata% in search window on task bar and press Enter key
  3. delete the thunderbird folder
  4. you should be in Appdata\roaming folder , copy&paste the exported Thunderbird folder there.
  5. start thunderbird and all should be there

On your question, to find the profile that thunderbird uses, do this: - click help troubleshootinginformation - scroll to 'profile folder' and click 'open folder' - you are now in the profile that thunderbird is using. note the name of the folder. other profiles can be deleted if not needed. I have done that with no problems. Thunderbird works with only one profile.
creator: davidsk

content:
Tips for importing a large volume of mail from Gmail:

Get the messages by label/folder, not in All Mail. Unzip the zipped take-out file. Install the add-on ImportExportToolsNG. Use ImportExportToolsNG to import each Gmail folder into a local folder in Thunderbird.

As much as I understand All Mail, which is not completely, you probably do not want to import it because it contains only duplicates of messages in other folders, including trash.

Import is not designed for this scenario.

content:
I don't think there are any folder size or age limits in Thunderbird. I have some IMAP folders with messages going back as far at 2004. I've archived off older emails to local folders. My largest IMAP folder is about 600 MB on my Windows NTFS hard disc. Mail providers may have limits, though.

It would be possible to run up against your operating system's file system limit. For example, FAT32 chokes on files larger than 4 GB. NTFS can handle files more than 8 petabytes, practically unlimited. Very large folders will probably perform slower, but they should work.

content:
The only email provider that I know of that uses an "All Mail" folder is Gmail. It's recommended for most people to hide that folder because it's not useful outside of Google's web mail interface. It shows by default when you set up Gmail, but if you have previously hidden it or want it showing, right-click on the account name in the left pane and choose "Subscribe". The context menu will show all available folders for that account - make sure "All Mail" is checked.

In case you're referring to Unified Folders, that option is found in the menu item <view | folders unified folders]. < p></view>

If that is correct, my guess is that something is preventing thunderbird from updating settings at shut down. It might be from an antivirus that is interfering, a VPN, or maybe the prefs.js file is read-only. I do NOT have the solution. I do suggest you check. Sometimes, it becomes obvious if you click help>troubleshootinginformation, scroll to 'profile folder' and click 'open folder' and see if there is more than one prefs.js file. If more than one, and the dates are recent, that would be proof of the problem.

content:
Chyba „cannot Renaming not supported across conflicting directory permissions“ v Mozilla Thunderbird většinou znamená, že Thunderbird nedokáže změnit nebo přejmenovat složku v souborovém systému, protože je problém s právy nebo se strukturou složek v profilu. Často se to stane u prázdných podadresářů v Doručené poště.

řešení: 1. Opravit složku (nejjednodušší řešení): V Thunderbirdu klikněte pravým tlačítkem na „Doručená pošta“. Zvolte Vlastnosti. Klikněte na Opravit složku (Repair Folder). Potom zkuste prázdné podsložky znovu smazat.

2. Zkomprimovat složky: Někdy se struktura složek „rozbije“. Pravým tlačítkem na účet nebo Doručená pošta. Kliknout Zkomprimovat (Compact). Pak zkuste znovu smazat.
creator: Ansamb

content:
1. Ukonči Thunderbird. 2. Otevři profilovou složku: C:\Users\USERNAME\AppData\Roaming\Thunderbird\Profiles\xxxxx.default-release\ 3. Jdi do Mail\ (nebo ImapMail\ podle typu účtu) a najdi složku účtu. 4. Otevři Inbox.sbd (nebo Archives.sbd) – to je adresář, kde jsou podadresáře doručené pošty. 5. Najdi prázdné složky (např. 2019, 2020 apod.) a smaž je ručně ve Windows. 6. Spusť znovu Thunderbird.

Tyto složky jsou jen zbytky po starých archivačních adresářích; pokud jsou prázdné, jejich smazání ve filesystemu je bezpečné a Thunderbird si je při startu znovu načte bez nich.

Rick, it says "An error occurred while sending e-mail. The mail server responded:<psmart@triad.rr.com> sender rejected. Please see https://www.spectrum.net/support/internet/understanding-email-error-codes. For more information. AUP#Out-1320. Please verify that your email address is correct in your account settings and try again."

I know very little about computers and need step by step instructions on what to do....Thanks, Paul Smart
creator: psmart1

content:
Step 1: Look up the error code. Here is what Spectrum says:

"Spectrum limits the number of concurrent connections from a sender, as well as the total number of connections allowed. Limits vary based on the reputation of the IP address. Reduce your number of connections and try again later."

Step 2: Call Spectrum for help. Ask them about connections and your reputation as a sender and how you can avoid these errors.

One factor in the quantity of connections is the quantity of devices you are using to access e-mail. Your reputation is probably based on factors that can indicate spamming: quantity of messages sent, whether or not messages have an opt-out or unsubscribe function, et cet.

In short, you may be sending too many messages that have similarities to spam from too many devices. In any case, it is not a Thunderbird issue.

Thunderbird biedt ondersteuning voor Exchange, dus u hebt deze add-on mogelijk niet nodig, afhankelijk van welke Outlook365-functionaliteit u wilt. Ik denk dat de 30-dagen trial ervan is afgelopen, en dan moet u beslissen of u de add-on wilt blijven gebruiken of wilt verwijderen. Mogelijk dat de koppeling om de licentie te kopen om veiligheidsredenen wordt geblokkeerd door Thunderbird, uw browser of uw firewall; u kunt wellicht contact opnemen met de leverancier van de add-on via https://addons.thunderbird.net/nl/thunderbird/addon/owl-for-exchange/. Op deze pagina staat een e-mailadres voor ondersteuning vermeld.
